hero_subtitle: SFTY helps crypto exchanges aggregate wallet risk signals, screen for sanctions exposure, and manage transaction monitoring within one auditable KYT workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Wallet risk signals remain disconnected from cases
problem_description: Exchanges struggle to unify wallet screening and transaction monitoring data within a single operational workflow. This fragmentation slows compliance reviews, weakens audit readiness and obscures the full risk context needed for effective decision making.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates wallet screening and transaction monitoring outputs into a unified workflow that links risk signals, customer data and alerts to structured cases and audit-ready evidence for exchange compliance teams.
workflow_title: From wallet risk to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY collects wallet risk signals and transaction data then routes alerts into cases with documented evidence for compliance review and decision reporting.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects wallet screening, transaction risk and sanctions exposure into a unified KYT workflow with cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for exchanges.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports exchanges managing wallet risk through controlled provider orchestration, clear evidence preservation and scalable deployment for structured compliance and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support wallet screening workflows for exchanges
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risk alerts connect to case investigations
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence preserves transaction monitoring history
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how provider outputs integrate into exchange compliance workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected compliance layer for exchanges, connecting wallet screening, transaction monitoring, sanctions exposure and risk signals into structured workflows and case management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage wallet screening workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals, links transactions and wallets to customers, creates alerts, and routes reviews within a single KYT workflow tailored for exchange compliance needs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready wallet evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting wallet screening evidence to support audit readiness and clear traceability of compliance actions for exchanges.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYT and screening providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates multiple KYT, blockchain analytics and screening providers, turning their outputs into centralized, controlled compliance workflows without disrupting existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace wallet screening or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above wallet screening and KYT providers, structuring their data into operational reviews and compliance cases rather than replacing underlying provider services.
final_title: Connect wallet screening into one KYT workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY supports exchange wallet risk aggregation, sanctions screening, transaction monitoring and structured case workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
